channel.title: Meibohm Fine Arts on Ric - An unknown artist
channel.description: Recent content in Meibohm Fine Arts on Ric - An unknown artist

item.title: Another new Ric found by Mark Strong
item.description: Short description: Docked Boat and Glowing Lamp Post at Twilight Size with wide margins 25-1/16" (ca. 63cm) x 42-5/8" (ca. 108cm), Image size 15-5/8" (ca. 40cm) x 32-7/8" (ca. 83cm). Notes: Thanks to Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts for the hint, available on eBay . Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts .

item.title: A new work of Ric discovered! Again by Mark Strong (Two of two)
item.description: Short description: Two swans in flight Notes: Thanks to Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts for the hint, available on eBay . Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . Other entries for this work

item.title: A new work of Ric discovered! Again by Mark Strong (One of two)
item.description: Short description: Three cormorans, one drying it’s wings Notes: Thanks to Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts for the hint, available on eBay Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . Other entries for this work

item.title: Yet yet another new work of Ric discovered!
item.description: Short description: A bridge - probably Pont des Arts , Paris Notes: Taken from eBay . The title of the listing suggests Pont des Arts, Paris. Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there is a post about it. Other entries for this work

item.title: Yet another new work of Ric discovered!
item.description: Short description Another scene of ships in a harbour Notes : Taken from eBay . Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there is a post about it. Other entries for this work

item.title: Another new work of Ric discovered!
item.description: Short description Another street scene with a lantern and a wind mill (which isn’t red - as one can suspect if this should be Paris). Notes : Taken from eBay . Image by Mark Strong of Meibohm Fine Arts . The description on eBay is very interesting, there is a post about it. Other entries for this work
